title: Farcr's Re-Crafted
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/OIsfjqM.png)

## About

A Very Small resource pack that changes plenty of things from the base game, into some redesigns I personally preferred. Tries to give the game a more sober and polished look, and hopefully more cohesiveness and a less jarring experience.
Mostly a personal pack, that over time gained traction and got released to the public - suggestions and bug reports are always welcome!

## Support
